---
title: "Started as Postdoctoral Research Fellow at the Data Sciences Institute"
date: "2025-09-08"
description: "Started as a Postdoctoral Research Fellow at the Data Sciences Institute, University of Toronto."
categories: [appointment]
---

I started a new position as Postdoctoral Research Fellow at the [Data Sciences Institute](https://datasciences.utoronto.ca/), University of Toronto.
